scripts.test: rm -rf ../../.tmp-tests/api && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node ../../.tmp-tests/api/auth.test.js && node ../../.tmp-tests/api/errors.test.js && node ../../.tmp-tests/api/mvp.test.js
scripts.test:integration: rm -rf ../../.tmp-tests/api-integration && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json --outDir ../../.tmp-tests/api-integration && node ../../.tmp-tests/api-integration/api-persistence.integration.test.js && node ../../.tmp-tests/api-integration/ai-review-queue.integration.test.js && node ../../.tmp-tests/api-integration/financial-profiles.integration.test.js
